title: lecaniodiscus fraxinifolius subsp. fraxinifolius
intro: Lecaniodiscus fraxinifolius subsp. fraxinifolius is a plant species in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the 'African cashew'. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Lecaniodiscus fraxinifolius subsp. fraxinifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
